meaning: n.短桨,划桨,明轮翼vi.划桨,戏水,涉水vt.用桨划,搅,拌
examples: Paddle like you're in a kayak or canoe.
These people parachute into dangerous areas, paddle alongside massive fishing boats, or release pamphlets from airplanes.
Nevertheless, he wished me luck and allocated one of his staff to paddle my support canoe.
It does not usually take long for most newbies to stand up and paddle themselves across the water.
